playbook.intent: Shipping product → top-3 Product Hunt launch with measurable signup and revenue lift.
playbook.scope: Run a structured 4-week campaign that takes a shipping indie product to a top-3 Product Hunt launch, with a measurable signup and revenue lift, then converts the spike into retained subscribers and audience.

success-criteria.criterion: Product Hunt launch day in top-3
Conversion drip live for new signups
Post-launch retention measured at day-7 and day-30

stage.name: Asset Prep
stage.intent: Page, copy, and screenshots ready 14 days before launch.

tasks.task: Write Product Hunt copy aligned to positioning
Stage the landing page for PH-referred traffic

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 3 outside readers say the listing makes them want to sign up.

stage.name: Audience Warm-up
stage.intent: Audience knows the launch date and committed to support.

tasks.task: Drip teaser content over X and the newsletter for 14 days
DM 50 hunters and makers with personal asks

stage.decision-gate: Advance when ≥30 makers confirm they will support on launch day.

stage.name: Launch Day
stage.intent: Top-3 by EOD via a tight runbook.

tasks.task: Publish at 00:01 PT; pin tweet; queue first 5 comments
Reply to every comment within 30 minutes
Push hourly progress updates in primary channel

stage.decision-gate: Stay in launch mode until midnight; advance when day-1 rank is locked.

stage.name: Conversion
stage.intent: Spike traffic converts to paid or trial users.

tasks.task: Activate onboarding email sequence for new signups
Route hot leads to a personal welcome DM
Run a 24-hour PH-day promo for paid plans

stage.decision-gate: Advance if day-7 paid conversion is ≥2% of new signups.

stage.name: Compounding
stage.intent: Launch spike feeds long-term audience growth.

tasks.task: Migrate visible new followers to newsletter via pinned tweet
Publish a post-launch retro with numbers
Add launch-week customers to a testimonial pipeline

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after numbers and testimonials are public.

extra.value: [Paid traffic strategies — pure organic launch, Multi-product Product Hunt strategy — single launch, Influencer / agency outreach — solo execution]
[A live product with at least 5 happy users, An owned audience or community where hunters can find you]
[Treating the playbook as a checklist instead of a decision tree, Skipping decision gates when intermediate progress feels good, Letting tools or platforms replace the founder's own judgement]

['Did each stage produce its named output or get explicitly skipped with a note?', 'Were decision gates respected or quietly bypassed?', 'Is the evidence trail strong enough to defend the verdict externally?']

{human: faion get-content product-hunt-4-week-launch-campaign --format md, agent: faion get-content product-hunt-4-week-launch-campaign --format context, json: faion get-content product-hunt-4-week-launch-campaign --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft from brainstorm-2026-05-17, persona P2 (indie hacker)'}]
